betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fluid Logistics: Pipes, Tanks & Pumps§f

§aPipe water, steam, and fuels through high-volume storage and pumping networks!§f
Managing liquids is vital for steam boilers, cooling loops, and fuel combustion systems.

§6Fluid Pipes & Storage§f:
§b• Fluid Pipe§f: Transfers up to §e500 mB per tick§f per connection.
§b• Fluid Tank§f: A massive stationary storage structure holding up to §e1,000,000 mB (1,000 buckets)§f of liquid.
§b• Barrel§f: A medium storage container holding up to §e64,000 mB (64 buckets)§f.
§b• Fluid Cart§f: A railway cargo cart designed to transport up to §e64,000 mB§f of liquid across tracks.

§6Fluid Pumps§f:
The Fluid Pump extracts liquids from the world automatically:
§b• Power Draw§f: Consumes §e10 FE/tick§f while active.
§b• Pump Radius§f: Operates in a radius of §e8 blocks/chunks§f.
§b• Infinite Water Source§f: The pump is configured to §anever consume water blocks§f (`pumpInfinityWater=true`), giving you an infinite supply of water for your steam boilers.
§b• Lava Harvesting Safeguard§f: Pumping lava replaces the source blocks with §bCobblestone§f (`replaceLavaWithCobble=true`). This prevents cascading flowing lava animations, saving server performance and preventing lag.
